title: Cheminots
description:
Play with friends to conduct the train at the end of the track while keeping satisfaction high.

Manage your ressource

Buy and collect coal and water. Make sure to have enough until the next stop or you will be stranded.

Play with friends

Cheminots is a co-op adventure for up to 5 players. Share task and try to not sabotage each other.

Take care of your passengers

Check valid transport papers. Discover weird new passengers. Take care of their needs with specialized wagons.

Drive the train

Fuel the engine with coal and be aware of the different needs to keep a good speed.

Buy toys to play with

Each shop contains new and fun toy like a sled, a paint bucket or a camera.
description_short: Cheminots is a train conducting simulator, together you need to make sure the passengers reach their destination. Manage your coal and your water. Keep your locomotive intact. Control your passengers and keep their satisfaction high.
